---
title: "William Laidlaw"
---

## William Laidlaw

**Dates:** (Scotland 1819-1879)

### Description

Anne Sturges Bourne\'s farm bailiff

### Biography

He married (1852) Miss Sturges Bourne\'s former ladies\' maid [[person:1820]Ellen Brown] (b. Cranbrook, Kent 1825/6), who died in 1860 leaving several young children. [1861 census;  marriage and death register]

### Letters

- Letter from May 20th [1871?[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
